title: Luffy Reaches Law Again
description: Pages 1–5 focus on luffy reaches law again, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the active characters in this part.
scene: This part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Doflamingo, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6 as luffy reaches Law again, but Doflamingo and Bellamy stand between the alliance and the final confrontation.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: So the weak, little fledgling of a feather flock together...

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo
dialogue.text: Fufufu! Looks like you're missing the key to those cuffs, eh, law?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Why the hell are you here!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: What a lame trap you've gotten yourselves into...secret passage? Hah!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Why does this all feel so routine!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: Literally anyone could have killed you peons!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: Looks like there's quite the gang out there after my head.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: I'm impressed that even under these circumstances you've managed to find yourself allies!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: I've respected that ability of yours since the war of the greatest! Really, hats off!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: But to think that the real man himself is this big of an idiot!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: Honestly, I thought so much better of you!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: Even as a child, you were more ruthless, more cunning! Wasn't it so!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: Who in the world turned you into such a gutless coward!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: Shut it! I have no desire to turn into someone like you!

dialogue.speaker: Sabo
dialogue.text: By my little brother Corazon!? Hah! If you aren't a coward...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #30
dialogue.text: Then why are you going to die a coward's death?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Stop Right There! Don't you dare lay a hand on Mr. Straw hat!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Are you all right, Mr. Straw hat!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #34
dialogue.text: So that was a clone after all!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #36
dialogue.text: I dunno what you're babbling about but let's just get the hell outta here!

summary: Luffy Reaches Law Again develops the chapter's Dressrosa conflict through Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Doflamingo, Unknown person #4, while preserving the OCR dialogue and keeping unclear speakers readable.
